zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Swete於1425年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Sir Knight Of Caston John Swete35歲，母親Alice Sweet31歲。他於大約1448年與Lady Curry Rivel在英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 利維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1487年在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Swete于1425年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Sir Knight Of Caston John Swete35岁，母亲Alice Sweet31岁。他于大约1448年与Lady Curry Rivel在英国英格兰薩默塞特加里 利維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1487年在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Somerset): from the Middle English personal name Swet(e) (Old English Swēt(a) (male), Swēte (female)), or else a nickname from Middle English swet(e), sweyt ‘sweet; pleasing; beloved; attractive’ (Old English swēte, swōt), from which the personal names derive. Compare Swett .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Suess   and French   Ledoux   ‘the gentle, the sweet’.

variants.name: Sweeting
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Sweting (Old English Swēting, a derivative of swēte ‘sweet’; see Sweet ).
nickname from Middle English sweting ‘darling, sweetheart’, used for a popular and attractive person, or for someone who habitually addressed people with the term.

variants.name: Swett
meanings: Altered form of English   Sweet  . This surname is also found in Chile, where it is at least in part of North American origin.
Americanized (possibly shortened) form of an unidentified eastern Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Sott
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English sot, Old English sott ‘foolish’, also commonly used as a noun denoting a foolish person.
English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English sot(e), swot(e), Old English swōt ‘sweet, pleasant, beloved’, also used as a noun meaning ‘dear one’. Compare Sweet .

English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English and Old English sōt, Old Norse sót ‘soot’, also used as an adjective ‘sooty’, perhaps given to someone with black hair. Among the Scandinavians it was used as a personal name, Sóti, which was brought to England by the Vikings.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Swete was born in 1425, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Knight Of Caston John Swete, was 35 and his mother, Alice Sweet, was 31. He married Lady Curry Rivel about 1448, in Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1487, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Swete est né en 1425, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knight Of Caston John Swete, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Sweet, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Curry Rivel environ 1448, à Curry Rivel, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1487, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Sweteが1425年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Of Caston John Sweteは35歳，母Alice Sweetは31歳であった。約1448年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトクウリー リベルでLady Curry Rivelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1487年にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Swete(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knight Of Caston John Swete(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Sweet(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 커리 라이벨에서 Lady Curry Rivel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1487년 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Curry Rivel aproximadamente 1448, em Curry Rivel, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Swete родился в 1425 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Knight Of Caston John Swete было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Sweet, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Curry Rivel около 1448 г. в местности курри ривел, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1487 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.
